Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.period

Interface IPeriodAnalysisDatum

All Known Implementing Classes:
PeriodAnalysisDataPoint, WWZStatistic
public interface IPeriodAnalysisDatum
This interface defines methods that must be supported by a single period analysis result datum/datapoint/result. Exactly what "power" and "amplitude" denotes depends upon the source (e.g. DC DFT vs WWZ). TODO: Perhaps this should instead give way to the use of a mapping from names to double values that make sense for a given context.
